message:
feat(console): Add ErrorPanel renderable for error display

Implements beautiful error panel visualization:
- ErrorSeverity enum with Critical/Error/Warning/Notice levels
- ErrorPanel with SQL context, position markers, hints, SQLSTATE
- render_plain() for agent/plain-text output
- render_styled() with ANSI colors and box drawing
- to_json() for structured output
- ThemeColor.color_code() method for truecolor escape sequences

24 tests covering all functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
